notes: FTD keeps the v1 public/ui assets byte-for-byte in the v2 public tree. The selected design/assets bytes are mirrors of those runtime assets so design-sheets has concrete identities from the first port pass.

design/assets/shop_no_ads.png.provenance: 2026-07-16 shop-art repair v2: the crossed-TV no-ads art from the original v1 generation batch (fabrika 37389ce70~1 shop_hint_pack_small.png bytes — the batch landed with no-ads and small-hint files swapped). 512px downscale.

design/assets/shop_hint_pack_blue_a.png.reason: blue-generation alternate kept as design source; runtime slot holds the orange-paw blue magnifier (was misfiled as shop_no_ads) from the v1 1024px batch (fabrika 37389ce70~1), 512px downscale, slots un-swapped 2026-07-16.

design/assets/shop_hint_pack_blue_b.png.reason: blue-generation alternate kept as design source; runtime slot holds the silver gold-paw magnifier from the v1 1024px batch (fabrika 37389ce70~1), 512px downscale, slots un-swapped 2026-07-16.

design/assets/shop_hint_pack_blue_c.png.reason: blue-generation alternate kept as design source; runtime slot holds the radiant gold magnifier from the v1 1024px batch (fabrika 37389ce70~1), 512px downscale, slots un-swapped 2026-07-16.
